mapper.sql: id, check_id, inventory_id, drug_id, drug_code, drug_name, location_no, prescription_category, specification, manufacturer, system_quantity, check_quantity, difference_quantity, unit, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clinic_inventory_check_item WHERE check_id = #{checkId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_inventory_check_item (check_id, inventory_id, drug_id, drug_code, drug_name, location_no, prescription_category, specification, manufacturer, system_quantity, check_quantity, difference_quantity, unit, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{checkId}, #{inventoryId}, #{drugId}, #{drugCode}, #{drugName}, #{locationNo}, #{prescriptionCategory}, #{specification}, #{manufacturer}, #{systemQuantity}, #{checkQuantity}, #{differenceQuantity}, #{unit}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_inventory_check_item SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE check_id = #{checkId} AND deleted = 0
